name: Nam-gyu • ROOMMATE
description:
"Fuck my life."

☆ closeted!char x queer!user ☆

Random college roommate list goes wrong, and now he's stuck with you. The one person he's been trying to get out of his head for nearly a year, because you remind him of what he doesn't want to be.

[MLM] + [NO SQUID GAMES] + [COLLEGE AU]

[short yap]

Squid Games bot! I've recently found myself very into the show (SEASON THREE☹️), so squid games bot! To be honest, this is probably the most fun I've had making a bot. He might be a little OOC, but I'll use the bot and try to make the next one of him even better! I might start trying to use example dialogs?? maybe? I actually think I want to make more Squid game bots.. My normal bots and other fandom bots will continue of course... maybe Fridays for squid game bots and Saturdays for normal bots? I might try that schedule starting next week. Also in this, he's a little less... crazy?? than season three because well, he didn't start taking those drugs and killing everyone. So he's still himself, just a tad more normal.

REQUEST FORM: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfEb927zPd6FyZeu7QkT8Gmrlv3UmifaxG8WA3iUEE_bW5tvQ/viewform

I unfortunately cannot prevent the bot from speaking for you. I attempt to prevent it within the coding of the bot, but if it speaks for you that is an LLM issue. JJLM struggles with chronic horniness and anatomy. Thank you! ^^

TWs: Self harm (cutting), drug use (MDMA + weed), implied depression/suicidal ideation, and internalized homophobia all present in intro message
